news.t: Pacer ETFs Celebrates Banner Year of Growth in 2022, Crosses $20B to Kickoff New Year
Pacer ETFs Factor Series Crosses $1 Billion in Assets Under Management

holdings.infoBox: ALTL is an equity ETF with a total of 100 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 2.50%, Micron Technology at 1.95%, Robinhood Markets at 1.94%, Western Digital at 1.66%, and Lam Research at 1.63%.

overview.description: The Pacer Lunt Large Cap Alternator ETF (ALTL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index that alternates exposure between low volatility and high-beta US stocks, weighted by momentum. ALTL was launched on Jun 24, 2020 and is issued by Pacer.
infoTable: Lunt Capital US Large Cap Equity Rotation Total Return

data.title: Pacer ETFs Factor Series Crosses $1 Billion in Assets Under Management
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pacer ETFs (“Pacer”), an ETF provider that offers strategy-driven, rules-based ETFs, announces the Pacer Factor ETF Series (“Factor series”) has surpassed $1 billion in ...
